sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111879" key="flu/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλύος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῠ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n111879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φλύαρος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">idle talk, foolery,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0232.tlg001:197" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">197</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
